description:
Steal my best AI secret codes & automations free 👉 https://sabrina.dev
33M+ views last month with Blotato. Special offer ends 4/30: 5000 credits ($30 value) + 5 Claude content skills 👉 https://blotato.com 

Most people fail at AI because they pick the wrong path. Are you building a marathon brand or do you need cash this week? As the founder of Blotato, I share the exact framework I used to grow to 2+ million social media followers, becoming the #1 AI Educator for Entrepreneurs, all while building a profitable AI app with zero employees. I break down the 9 most viable AI business models into 2 distinct categories: Path A (The Inbound/Audience Route) and Path B (The Outbound/Sales Route).

Path A is for those who want to build long-term assets through AI Content Creation, Repurposing, Faceless YouTube Channels, and Education Communities on platforms like Skool. Path B is for people who need income immediately, focusing on high-ticket services like Personal AI Assistants, Claude Training for business teams, AI Consulting, and AI Automation Agencies (AAA). I get into the reality of the service game, including why conducting AI audits and leveraging volume in cold DMs on Instagram and LinkedIn is the fastest way to get paid.

I also dive into the emerging world of Vibe Coding, explaining how to build MVPs that provide value in 90 seconds and why you must eventually flip your time to 90% marketing if you want your product to survive. I pull back the curtain on why most AI agencies fail to scale and how to rise above the "AI slop" on Upwork by acting like a human. You will learn how to identify the 5 levels of AI maturity in a business and why most founders are desperately looking for someone to just "do it for them." Whether you are using n8n for automations, learning Claude Code, or trying to monetize your expertise, this video provides a roadmap for picking the right path based on your personality and financial needs. Stop guessing which tools to use and start focusing on the systems that actually drive revenue.

⏱️ Chapters
00:00 - The Two Paths to AI Profits
00:27 - Examples of AI Success ($30k/Month)
01:07 - Path A: Audience & Long-Term Assets
01:28 - Timeline: 1 to 3 Years to Build
02:32 - #1 AI Content Creator (Path A)
04:53 - Shortcut: Copying Viral Hooks
06:39 - #2 Repurposing as a Service (Path A)
08:49 - Delivering Outcomes, Not Just Tasks
10:18 - #3 Faceless YouTube Channels (Path A)
11:46 - Making $50k/Month via AdSense
14:22 - Leveraging Short-Form Algorithms
16:03 - #4 AI Education Communities (Path A)
17:56 - The Premium Value of Talented People
20:41 - Scaling to $50k/Month Funnel
22:12 - #5 Personal AI Assistant for Founders (Path B)
26:08 - Finding Leads in Comment Sections
28:08 - Pitching 15-Hour Weekly Savings
28:59 - #6 Claude Training for Businesses (Path B)
30:49 - Pricing Teams at $10k-$40k
34:50 - The 200-DM Sales Cadence
35:32 - #7 AI Consulting and Audits (Path B)
38:10 - The 5 Levels of AI Maturity
41:41 - The "Don't Fall Behind" Sales Pitch
42:01 - #8 AI Automation Agency (AAA) (Path B)
44:44 - Community vs Agency Profitability
45:30 - n8n and the Reality of Workflow Maintenance
46:15 - The Headache of Messy Infrastructure
50:04 - Winning on Upwork (Anti-AI Slop)
53:09 - Physical Sales & Door-to-Door Tactics
55:17 - #9 Vibe Coding & SaaS Products
56:37 - Enterprise Value & Exit Multiples
58:10 - The 90-Second One-Thing Rule
59:09 - The 90/10 Marketing Flip
1:02:58 - Avoiding the Product-Building Trap
1:05:57 - Summary: Choosing Your Marathon

Alternative Titles for the algo:
- 9 AI Businesses You Can Start Today (With No Employees)
- Path A vs Path B: How to Actually Make Money with AI
- How to Make Your First $10,000 with AI (Path A and Path B)
- Stop Using AI the Wrong Way: 9 Proven Business Models
- From 0 to 2 Million Followers: My AI Business Playbook

#ai #claude #chatgpt
--

I'm Sabrina Ramonov. I'm on a mission to teach 1 million people AI. I'm also the solo founder of Blotato.com. It's a SaaS app for creators/entrepreneurs to go viral faster with AI, just like me (0 to 500k+ in 6 months solo).

How I got here…

Today: Started https://Blotato.com to distribute 100+ pieces of content per week. 1000s of creators & entrepreneurs use Blotato to go viral faster with AI.

Get FREE AI prompts, playbooks, and agents 👉 https://sabrina.dev/p/free
